title: Gourmet
description: Library mod that can make any item edible.
body:
Has a Java API and JSON data-driven format usable in data packs and mods.

I have made 2 examples mods:
- [crunch](https://modrinth.com/mod/gourmet-crunch)
- [sap](https://modrinth.com/mod/gourmet-sap)

Simple JSON file to make a brick give 1 shank of hunger:
```json
{
  "item": "minecraft:brick",
  "hunger": 2,
  "saturation": 0
}
```
